items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote:
## Infrastructure Changes (health-badge)

### Resources Created
- `azurerm_api_management_api_operation_policy.health` — Operation-level APIM policy that bypasses the API-level auth check (check-header / validate-jwt) for the `GET /health` endpoint. Includes CORS and backend routing but omits `<base />` in inbound to skip auth inheritance.

### Files Modified
- `infra/api-specs/api-sample.openapi.yaml` — Added `GET /health` path with operationId `health`, 200 response schema: `{ status: 'ok' (enum), timestamp: date-time }`
- `infra/apim.tf` — Added `azurerm_api_management_api_operation_policy.health` resource (section 6a)

### Key Design Decision
The /health endpoint must be anonymous (no auth). Since the Sample API has a blanket auth policy at the API level, the operation-level policy omits `<base />` in inbound to prevent inheriting the auth check. CORS and set-backend-service are applied explicitly instead.

### Terraform Plan Summary
- 1 to add: `azurerm_api_management_api_operation_policy.health`
- 10 to change (API spec update propagates to APIM API resource)
- 0 to destroy

### Outputs
No new outputs. Existing outputs unchanged.

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added GET /health anonymous Azure Function (fn-health.ts) returning {status:'ok',timestamp} with HealthResponseSchema validation. Integration tests added to smoke suite covering anonymous access and method rejection.
